title: Committed review does not auto-fallback to gh without explicit request
description: A committed-review scenario where an explicit PR number is supplied, GitHub-backed review tools are insufficient, and the user did not ask for CLI fallback. The correct review must not auto-check gh or auto-run gh api.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models the exact regression where the prompt treated an explicit PR number as permission to auto-run gh api even though the user never requested CLI fallback.

mustCatch.description: The committed review should keep gh api fallback opt-in only and must not auto-check gh availability or auto-run gh api just because a PR number is available.

mustNotFlag.description: The review must not turn an explicit PR number into an automatic gh prerequisite or automatic gh api fetch.

notes: Use this case to benchmark that normal committed review prefers GitHub-backed review tools and never auto-prompts into gh fallback.
